prompt: A detailed, cinematic medium shot of a confident young woman and a stylish young man standing on a modern urban skywalk balcony. The woman has long, flowing dark hair, a warm and natural smile, and is posing relaxed with one arm resting on a clear glass railing. She is wearing a chic, textured earth-toned brown shirt and matching trousers. Next to her stands a young man with styled dark hair, a neatly trimmed beard, and a light-colored button-up shirt. They are overlooking a vibrant downtown cityscape filled with towering glass skyscrapers and colorful contemporary mural-covered buildings. Photorealistic, soft natural daylight, shallow depth of field, 8k resolution
